critique.primary_failure: LATE_BLOOMER profile. Severe decay in recent windows.
critique.reason: Gap Pressure signal (SGP) has fundamentally failed in the modern Power Lotto environment (recent 1-2 years). The positive edge in the maximum window is entirely driven by ancient history, making it deceptive and dangerous for current inference.

lessons_learned: Gap Pressure signal (SGP) suspended for Power Lotto under current linear framework. 5 SGP versions and 16 group tests showed no viable edge in recent data. Restart conditions: non-linear Gap theory orthogonal to frequency, or dataset doubling. Power Precision (F2+Echo/Cold) remains current standard.
